title: Malaysian Energizing Dill Satay
description: A light and refreshing Malaysian-inspired dish featuring dill, score-fat, and a hint of coconut, perfect for a quick and easy snack or dessert.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together coconut milk, lime juice, garlic, ginger, and salt.
Add the chopped fresh dill to the bowl and mix well.
Add the boneless chicken breast to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the score-fat onto the grill or grill pan.
Grill the satay for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Serve warm with additional fresh dill and a side of peanut sauce, if desired.
Garnish with toasted coconut flakes, if desired.
